flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bellevue University fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (18.9% → 12.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bellevue University fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (72.0% → 57.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bellevue University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.3k → $9.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bellevue University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.3k → $9.9k).
